series_metadata.series_description: Grants or cooperative agreements where the ODNR is the prime or sub- recipient of federal funding or where the Division of Wildlife funds are used. Can include, but may not be limited to, grant applications and supporting documentation, award and acceptance forms, quarterly reports, progress reports explaining the use of funds, financial reports, time and effort reports from consultants, correspondence, and copies of documents such as financial records, personnel record for individuals reimbursed under the award, and contracts for work performed. Files are maintained for audit purposes as mandated by federal granting agencies and to document project outcomes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from date of notification by awarding agency that grant has been programmatically & fiscally closed or final single year audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: from date of notification by awarding agency that grant has been programmatically & fiscally closed or final single year audit report is released, whichever is later
